title: cyclobalanopsis reclinatocaulis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis reclinatocaulis, also known as the reclinatocaulis oak, is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the Fagaceae family, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis reclinatocaulis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory infections. Traditional herbal preparations involve decocting the plant's leaves and branches to create teas, infusions, and tonics that are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
